question: Which customers have never placed an order?
reference_sql: SELECT c.customer_name FROM customers AS c WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders AS o WHERE o.customer_id = c.customer_id) ORDER BY c.customer_name;

question: What was total completed-order revenue by product category in 2024?
reference_sql: SELECT p.category, ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS total_revenue FROM orders AS o JOIN order_items AS oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN products AS p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' AND o.order_date >= '2024-01-01' AND o.order_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY total_revenue DESC, p.category;

question: Who were the top 3 customers by completed-order revenue in 2024?
reference_sql: SELECT c.customer_name, ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS total_revenue FROM customers AS c JOIN orders AS o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id JOIN order_items AS oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' AND o.order_date >= '2024-01-01' AND o.order_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.customer_name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC, c.customer_name LIMIT 3;

question: Which products have never been sold in a completed order?
reference_sql: SELECT p.product_name FROM products AS p WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM order_items AS oi JOIN orders AS o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE oi.product_id = p.product_id AND o.status = 'completed') ORDER BY p.product_name;

question: How many open high-priority support tickets does each customer segment have?
reference_sql: SELECT c.segment, COUNT(*) AS open_high_priority_tickets FROM support_tickets AS st JOIN customers AS c ON st.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE st.priority = 'high' AND st.resolution_status = 'open' GROUP BY c.segment ORDER BY open_high_priority_tickets DESC, c.segment;

question: Which customers used invoice payments for at least one paid order?
reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT c.customer_name FROM customers AS c JOIN orders AS o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id JOIN payments AS p ON o.order_id = p.order_id WHERE p.payment_method = 'invoice' AND p.payment_status = 'paid' ORDER BY c.customer_name;
